question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged external user supply a crafted HooksRequest with lowerBound=0 and upperBound=Long.MAX_VALUE to enumerate all hookIds belonging to any ownerId via findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween(), thereby discovering fee-controlling hooks and their IDs to target for fee manipulation outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user pass an arbitrary ownerId (resolved via entityService.lookup()) that belongs to a fee-schedule hook owner, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween() to return all fee-related hooks for that owner, leaking the full set of fee-controlling hook configurations outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user supply a hookIds collection that exactly matches known fee-schedule hook IDs, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdIn() to return those specific hooks, and then use the returned fee parameters to craft transactions that exploit fee values outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user set lowerBound equal to upperBound to a specific hookId known to control transaction fees, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween() to return exactly that fee hook, leaking its fee parameters and enabling fee manipulation outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the default upperBound of Long.MAX_VALUE in HooksRequest to perform an unbounded scan of all hooks for a given ownerId, including fee-schedule hooks, causing excessive database load (DoS) that disrupts fee processing outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user set the limit parameter to its maximum allowed value and combine it with lowerBound=0/upperBound=Long.MAX_VALUE to bulk-extract all fee-related hook records in a single request, enabling offline analysis of fee structures to craft transactions outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user supply a Sort.Direction of ASC vs DESC to control the ordering of returned fee hooks, and by iterating through pages infer the complete fee schedule stored in hooks, enabling fee manipulation outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user pass a hookIds list containing a single fee-controlling hookId that falls within the lowerBound/upperBound range, causing the idsInRange filter to pass it through to findByOwnerIdAndHookIdIn(), thereby precisely targeting and reading fee hook data outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user supply a hookIds list where all IDs fall outside the lowerBound/upperBound range, causing idsInRange to be empty and returning List.of() silently, and use this behavior as an oracle to binary-search for the exact hookId range of fee-controlling hooks outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user call getHookStorage() with isHistorical()=false and supply a hookId corresponding to a fee-schedule hook, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyBetweenAndDeletedIsFalse() to return all current fee storage entries, leaking fee parameters outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user set keys to empty in HookStorageRequest, causing the code to fall into the keyLowerBound/keyUpperBound range path in findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyBetweenAndDeletedIsFalse(), and by supplying 0x00...00 to 0xFF...FF as bounds enumerate all fee-related storage slots outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user supply specific byte[] keys known to correspond to fee-schedule storage slots in a hook, causing findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyInAndDeletedIsFalse() to return those exact fee values, enabling precise fee parameter extraction outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the DeletedIsFalse filter in findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyBetweenAndDeletedIsFalse() to confirm which fee storage slots are active vs deleted, using the presence/absence of results as an oracle to map the fee schedule structure outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user pass a HookStorageRequest with a non-empty timestamp Bound to trigger isHistorical()=true, routing the request to getHookStorageChange(), and thereby access historical fee storage states that may contain superseded fee values outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user supply a timestamp range spanning the entire ledger history (timestampLowerBound=0, timestampUpperBound=Long.MAX_VALUE) to retrieve all historical fee storage changes for a given hookId, enabling reconstruction of the complete fee modification history outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the 'distinct on (key)' behavior in findByKeyBetweenAndTimestampBetween() to retrieve only the most recent fee value per key within a timestamp window, and by sliding the timestamp window reconstruct the full fee change timeline outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keys collection to findByKeyInAndTimestampBetween() targeting specific fee-schedule storage keys, and by varying the timestamp range determine exactly when fee values were changed, enabling timing-based fee manipulation outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the fact that getHookStorageChange() does not filter by deleted=false (unlike the non-historical path), causing it to return fee storage entries that were logically deleted, leaking fee values that should no longer be accessible outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user set keysInRange to empty while requestHasKeys=true, causing the early return of List.of(), and use this as a binary-search oracle to determine the exact byte[] key boundaries of fee-schedule storage slots outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user supply a timestamp Bound where adjustUpperBound() returns Long.MAX_VALUE (by omitting the upper bound), causing the query to scan all future timestamps and return any fee storage changes that may have been pre-committed outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the Bound.adjustUpperBound() off-by-one behavior (LT operator decrements by 1) to craft a timestamp range that precisely excludes or includes a specific fee-change event, enabling selective fee history reconstruction outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorageChange()] Can an unprivileged user exploit the Bound.getAdjustedLowerRangeValue() GT operator increment (lowerBound++) to craft a timestamp lower bound that skips exactly one nanosecond, bypassing a fee-change event at a known timestamp and receiving a different fee state outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user resolve a victim entity's ownerId via entityService.lookup() using a publicly known EVM address or alias, then enumerate all fee-controlling hooks owned by that entity via findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween(), enabling cross-account fee schedule discovery outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHooks()] Can an unprivileged user supply an EntityIdAliasParameter for a well-known system account that owns fee-schedule hooks, causing entityService.lookup() to resolve it and then returning all fee hooks via findByOwnerIdAndHookIdBetween(), leaking system-level fee parameters outside design parameters?

[File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/HookServiceImpl.java -> Scope: Medium: Modification of transaction fees outside of design parameters'] [Function: getHookStorage()] Can an unprivileged user supply a keyLowerBound and keyUpperBound that are identical (single-key range) to precisely target a known fee-schedule storage slot in findByOwnerIdAndHookIdAndKeyBetweenAndDeletedIsFalse(), extracting the exact fee value stored at that slot outside design parameters?
